slides.title: From Venture Builder To Financial Entrepreneur
slides.body: Discover ✓ Validate ✓ — today we shift toward Advise.
slides.speakerNotes: Frame the week arc: interns have discovered and validated; Friday bridges to advisor mindset.

slides.title: Meet Miguel
slides.body: Our client profile for the empathy workshop.
slides.speakerNotes: Introduce Miguel before pitch block — he returns after presentations.

slides.title: The 5-Stage Client Journey
slides.speakerNotes: Connect discovery work to where Miguel sits on the journey.

slides.title: From Understanding To Helping
slides.body: Validation proves the problem; empathy opens the door to advice.
slides.speakerNotes: Transition from researcher to future advisor.

slides.title: Market Validation Pitch
slides.body: 5 minutes per squad — present evidence, not ideas.
slides.speakerNotes: Hand off to SPIKE Studio pitch presentations. Return to deck after all squads present.

slides.title: Client Profile — Miguel
slides.body: 24, Marketing Associate, Cebu — first job, dreams of financial independence.

slides.title: Empathy In Action
slides.body: Four steps: Observe → Listen → Understand → Connect
slides.speakerNotes: Model before individual worksheet time in SPIKE Playbook.

slides.title: Think Like Miguel — Empathy Map
slides.speakerNotes: Participants complete Empathy Lab in SPIKE Playbook.

slides.title: Squad Discussion
slides.body: Compare empathy maps — what surprised your squad?
discussionQuestions: What pattern did multiple squads see in Miguel?

slides.title: Reflect & Share
slides.body: Squad insight · Key takeaways · Connect to your role as a future advisor
slides.speakerNotes: Capture in SPIKE — saves to portfolio automatically.

slides.title: What Would You Ask Miguel?
slides.body: Before you advise, you must understand.

slides.title: Week 3 — ADVISE
slides.body: From validated problem to trusted guidance.

slides.title: You Are Here To Help
slides.body: Empathy builds trust — advice follows understanding.

slides.title: See You Monday
slides.body: Stage Gate II · Squad XP · Week 3 Advise unlock
slides.speakerNotes: Close with Stage Gate ceremony if time permits.
